2026-0492
2026-05-26TCFederal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board ActReappointment of a full-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment BoardReappointment of Caroline Engmann of Ottawa, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective September 13, 2026.N/A
act: Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board Act
subject: Reappointment of a full-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board
precis: Reappointment of Caroline Engmann of Ottawa, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective September 13, 2026.
